title: XenNote
description: A mod which adds new note blocks that supports any regular tunings
body:
A mod which adds new note blocks that supports [microtonal/xenharmonic tunings](https://en.xen.wiki) (currently [JI](https://en.xen.wiki/w/Just_intonation) and any [equal-step tunings](https://en.xen.wiki/w/Equal-step_tuning)).

The xenharmonic note block can be crafted as below:

![3 redstone dusts at the top and 2 at the bottom corners, a vanilla note block at the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/886b7dcdc646eab343bbe9c8fb0165811220d09a.png)

Notes are represented as the ratio to the original sample ([F♯4\12](https://www.yacavone.net/xen-calc/?q=F♯4\12) for most instruments). In an equal-step tuning, notes are mapped using the [GPV](https://en.xen.wiki/w/Patent_val#Generalized_patent_val) of the tuning.
